name: Write-Information
-MessageData
-Msg
-Message
options.description: Specifies an informational message that you want to display to users as they run a script or command. For best results, enclose the informational message in quotation marks.

options.name: -Tags
options.description: One or more strings that you can use to sort and filter messages that you have added to the information stream with `Write-Information`. This parameter works similarly to the Tags parameter in `New-ModuleManifest`.

description: Specifies how PowerShell handles information stream data for a command.
